title: Add Generador y Editor de Imgenes y Videos con Pollina to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Luces, cámara, Pollina!
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! 'Generador y Editor de Imágenes y Videos con Pollina' lets you generate, edit, and export your visual creations with ease.
gist.summary: Added 'Generador y Editor de Imágenes y Videos con Pollina' to the community app showcase, featuring image and video generation, editing, and exporting capabilities.
gist.impact: Users can now explore a new Spanish-language tool for creating and editing media, complete with resolution adjustments, clip trimming, and filters.
gist.visual_concept: The app is a video and image editor/generator. Key symbols: film reels, cameras, painting canvas, photos. Characters: Polly the bee wearing a director's beret or holding a clapperboard. Setting: A cozy editing studio.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny movie director's beret, looking at a glowing retro computer monitor showing a video editing timeline. A chunky pixel robot companion holds a film clapperboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
